name: us-fcf-yield
description: Pure free-cash-flow yield (CFO − capex over market cap) — the most robust single value metric. Frozen on development evidence alone (2010-19: IC +0.022 t 2.87, 6m beat 54.9%) and confirmed by the single validation look (2020-22: IC +0.058 t 2.71, 6m beat 57.1%). One parameter; ~10% monthly turnover.
